innate_abilities.name: Hard-wired for Destruction (off objective)
innate_abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker your opponent controls, you can reroll the Hit roll instead.

innate_abilities.name: Hard-wired for Destruction (on objective)
innate_abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker your opponent controls, you can reroll the Hit roll instead.
